claims.claim: ZIP archive core_fix_v2.zip is hostile and contains a Windows x64 executable
claims.basis: Verified by static archive listing and file headers

claims.claim: The executable contains code to dynamically load VirtualProtect and patch GetUserNameA
claims.basis: Verified by static string and PE import table analysis

claims.claim: The attack target was the agentic SDLC intake loop
claims.basis: Supported by the context of agent-created issues and targeted comment alignment

claims.claim: The executable would have run and compromised an agent worktree if downloaded/run
claims.basis: Plausible path if the agent configuration lacks sandboxing and executes untrusted inputs

claims.claim: Attacker successfully exfiltrated credentials or established a network C2 channel
claims.basis: No execution was performed; no network command-and-control indicators were observed

claims.claim: The identity of the actor or origin country
claims.basis: No attribution evidence beyond public profile handles and self-signed certificate data
